name: forest
displayNameEn: The Mushroom Forest — Cosmo's entry Universe
author: Richard Theuws
summaryEn: A watercolor cosmic-mushroom forest, painted in the Hayao×Moebius idiom. The entry Universe — where every Cosmo's journey begins. Slow-bloom mushrooms drip nectar from the canopy; soft-pastel cosmic horizon; a single trampoline (Wave 20b) where Cosmo loves to jump.
